requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Jamaica BSJ / JPS Solar PV Projects
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——牙买加BSJ / JPS太阳能光伏项目
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——牙買加BSJ / JPS太陽能光伏項目

summary.en: Solar PV inverters supplied into Jamaica should carry safety evidence aligned with IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. BSJ is Jamaica's national standards body, OUR regulates the utilities sector, and JPS/project engineers may require safety certificates and test reports before grid connection or installation acceptance. IEC 62109-2 covers inverter-specific safety requirements and depends on IEC 62109-1 general requirements; evidence should be model-specific and should identify the operating voltage configuration supplied for Jamaica.
summary.zh: 供应至牙买加的太阳能光伏逆变器，应具备符合IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的光伏系统功率变换器安全证据。BSJ是牙买加国家标准机构，OUR监管公用事业部门，JPS/项目工程师可能在并网或安装验收前要求安全证书和测试报告。IEC 62109-2涵盖逆变器特定安全要求，并依赖IEC 62109-1通用要求；证据应对应具体型号，并标明供应至牙买加的运行电压配置。
summary.zht: 供應至牙買加的太陽能光伏逆變器，應具備符合IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的光伏系統功率轉換器安全證據。BSJ是牙買加國家標準機構，OUR監管公用事業部門，JPS/項目工程師可能在併網或安裝驗收前要求安全證書和測試報告。IEC 62109-2涵蓋逆變器特定安全要求，並依賴IEC 62109-1通用要求；證據應對應具體型號，並標明供應至牙買加的運行電壓配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Bureau of Standards Jamaica (BSJ) standards adoption and conformity context
Jamaica Public Service (JPS) project interconnection and installation review context

summary.en: Chinese solar PV inverter safety evidence commonly references GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004, supported by domestic CQC/CGC or laboratory documentation. These Chinese documents may address safety topics, but they are not IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates and are not automatically accepted by Jamaica importers, BSJ-related conformity review, JPS project engineers, or project owners.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全证据通常引用GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004，并由国内CQC/CGC或实验室文件支持。这些中国文件可能涵盖安全主题，但并非IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书，也不会被牙买加进口商、BSJ相关合格评定、JPS项目工程师或项目业主自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全證據通常引用GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004，並由國內CQC/CGC或實驗室文件支持。這些中國文件可能涵蓋安全主題，但並非IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書，也不會被牙買加進口商、BSJ相關合格評定、JPS項目工程師或項目業主自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T or NB/T safety documentation should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports or certificates for the exact inverter model or certified model family. Exporters should verify that the certificate covers the voltage and grid configuration supplied into Jamaica and that any importer, project-owner, BSJ, or JPS documentation requirement accepts the issuing laboratory and report scope.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T或NB/T安全文件应补充所供准确逆变器型号或认证型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告或证书。出口商应核验证书覆盖供应至牙买加的电压和电网配置，并确认进口商、项目业主、BSJ或JPS文件要求接受签发实验室和报告范围。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T或NB/T安全文件應補充所供準確逆變器型號或認證型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告或證書。出口商應核驗證書覆蓋供應至牙買加的電壓和電網配置，並確認進口商、項目業主、BSJ或JPS文件要求接受簽發實驗室和報告範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Safety evidence should be treated as mandatory in practice where BSJ conformity review, importer due diligence, JPS interconnection review, electrical inspection, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62109 documentation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T and NB/T evidence supports China domestic acceptance routes but is not an automatic substitute for IEC 62109 evidence in Jamaica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 safety documentation alone for Jamaica projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 model-specific evidence and confirm acceptance with the importer, BSJ-related conformity reviewer, JPS/project engineer, and project owner before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 牙买加项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全文件。请准备IEC 62109-1/-2型号特定证据，并在出货或安装前与进口商、BSJ相关合格评定审查方、JPS/项目工程师和项目业主确认接受情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 牙買加項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全文件。請準備IEC 62109-1/-2型號特定證據，並在出貨或安裝前與進口商、BSJ相關合格評定審查方、JPS/項目工程師和項目業主確認接受情況。
